# Pull Request Title

## Description

Replace this with your PR description.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Infrastructure / tooling
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Manual testing completed

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or API keys committed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Co-authored-by trailer included in commit message
- [ ] Branch name follows conventions (feat/, fix/, docs/, etc.)

## Related Issue

Closes #(issue number)

---

**Build Gate Status**: All checks must pass before merge.
